name: Contango Holdings plc
summary: Contango Holdings plc engages in the exploration, development, production, and sale of metallurgical coal to industrial consumers in the Southern Africa region. It owns a 70% interest in the Lubu Coal project, which covers 19,236 hectares located in the Hwange mining district in north-western Zimbabwe; and interest in the Garalo gold mining project located in Mali. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
